instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that maps an order `status` string to a human-readable label using nested `<#if>` / `<#elseif>` branches for pending, shipped, delivered, and cancelled. Unknown statuses fall back to "Unknown status".
code:
<#-- Model: status: string --> <#assign normalized = (status!"")?lower_case>

Status: <#if normalized == "pending"> Pending payment <#elseif normalized == "shipped"> Shipped <#elseif normalized == "delivered"> Delivered <#elseif normalized == "cancelled"> Cancelled <#else> Unknown status
